item.title: Bob Dylan
item.description: Genres: folk rock, contemporary folk, singer-songwriter, blues rock, country rock Scene: Greenwich Village folk scene Era: 1961–present (primary period: 1962–1976) RYM · Apple Music · Spotify Bob Dylan arrived in New York in January 1961 as a nineteen-year-old from Hibbing, Minnesota, carrying an ac...

item.title: Chuck Berry
item.description: Genres: Rock & roll, rhythm & blues Scene: Chicago (Chess Records) Era: 1955–1964 (primary period) RYM · Apple Music · Spotify The intro to “Johnny B.

item.title: The Beatles
item.description: Genres: Pop rock, psychedelic pop, art rock Scene: Merseybeat Movement: British beat boom Era: British Invasion (1963–1970) Playlist: FAB RYM · Apple Music · Spotify The Beatles are the axis around which twentieth-century popular music turns.

item.title: The Kinks
item.description: Genres: Pop rock, Mod, baroque pop, art rock Scene: Mod, North London Era: 1964–1996 (primary period: 1964–1970) RYM · Apple Music · Spotify Dave Davies slashed his amplifier speaker with a razor blade and the sound that came out — a ragged, distorted roar underpinning the riff on “You Really Got Me...

item.title: The Rolling Stones
item.description: Genres: British blues, blues rock, rock & roll, roots rock Scene: London (Richmond, then Soho) Era: 1962–present (primary period: 1968–1972) RYM · Apple Music · Spotify Keith Richards plays behind the beat.

item.title: The Who
item.description: Genres: Mod, freakbeat, art rock, hard rock, rock opera Scene: Mod, Shepherd’s Bush, London Era: 1964–present (primary period: 1965–1973) RYM · Apple Music · Spotify Most drummers keep time.

item.title: British blues
item.description: Blues → Electric blues → British blues Period: c.

item.title: Chicago blues
item.description: Blues → Electric blues → Chicago blues Period: Late 1940s–present (peak: 1948–mid-1960s) Location: Chicago, Illinois (South Side and West Side) Key influences: Delta blues, country blues, jump blues RYM Muddy Waters’s slide guitar cutting through the noise of a South Side club at two in the morning,...
